title: War Historian, Repy
description:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]"One-Time-Use Keys"[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

notes: The [gold]Lantern Key[/gold] is a quest card required to access this event. Unlocking the cage grants the [gold]History Course[/gold] relic and records that Repy has been freed in the run state. Unlocking the chest instead provides 2 random potions and 2 random relics. Both options remove all [gold]Lantern Key[/gold] cards from your deck as the final step. The code path shows Repy responds differently to each choice: freeing him earns his gratitude, while taking the treasure prompts his moral disapproval.
